# AI Freedom Institute

> Empowering Students with AI Skills for the Future

AI Freedom Institute provides practical, hands-on AI training for 4 audiences: Schools, Corporate Teams, Individual Learners, and Business Owners. We deliver interactive AI workshops, productivity training, and career-focused AI courses across India — no coding required. Founded by Ajit (AI Finance Guy) — AI trainer and creator, author of 3 books, 32 AI projects delivered, speaker at webinars, seminars and courses across India.

- Phone: +91 8007280721
- Email: info@aifreedom.in
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918007280721
- Website: https://www.aifreedom.in
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@AIFreedomInstitute

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.aifreedom.in/): Hub page — 4 AI program funnels, features, testimonials, stats
- [Schools](https://www.aifreedom.in/schools): 1-hour AI awareness workshops for school & college students
- [Corporate](https://www.aifreedom.in/corporate): AI productivity & automation training for teams — save 2-3 hours daily
- [Individuals](https://www.aifreedom.in/individuals): Learn AI skills (image gen, video, content, freelancing) — no coding
- [Business](https://www.aifreedom.in/business): AI-powered marketing, lead gen, content & operations for business owners
- [Contact](https://www.aifreedom.in/contact): Book a free demo — form, phone, email, WhatsApp
- [Course Hub](https://www.aifreedom.in/Course): OTT-style course catalog with AI courses from ₹499
- [Blog](https://www.aifreedom.in/blog/): Practical AI guides and tutorials for Indian students, professionals, and business owners

## Flagship Programs

- [AI Mastery Program](https://www.aifreedom.in/offers/ai-mastery-program): ₹25,000 (was ₹85,000) · live mentor-led offline classroom training · 30 seats per batch · covers AI tools, prompts, content creation, freelancing, automation, websites, resume; includes ₹15,000+ in bonus templates &amp; community access · Book a free demo first
- [AI Train The Trainer — 30-Day Certification](https://www.aifreedom.in/offers/ai-train-the-trainer): 30-day live cohort + certification · 3 tiers (₹9,999 Basic / ₹24,999 Professional / ₹49,999 Master Trainer with EMI) · trains corporate professionals, educators &amp; consultants to deliver AI workshops · includes prompt library, slide decks, client outreach scripts &amp; community access

## Course Landing Pages

- [AI Basics — Zero to Hero](https://www.aifreedom.in/courses/ai-basics): ₹499 · 10 lessons · no-code AI foundation
- [AI Prompt Engineering](https://www.aifreedom.in/courses/ai-prompt-engineering): ₹699 · 10 lessons · 10x better AI output
- [AI Freelancing Masterclass](https://www.aifreedom.in/courses/ai-freelancing): ₹1,499 · 10 lessons · ₹50K/month blueprint
- [AI Se Kamao — Earn with AI](https://www.aifreedom.in/courses/ai-se-kamao): ₹2,999 · 10 lessons · 10 income streams
- [AI Trading Mastery](https://www.aifreedom.in/courses/ai-trading): ₹2,999 · 10 lessons · AI-powered market analysis
